task_completion.description: Log in to the OpenSIS application using the provided credentials.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenSIS dashboard or portal is visible, indicating a successful login as the 'admin' user.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the Mass Attendance or Take Attendance tool.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The screen displays the 'Mass Attendance', 'Take Attendance', or similar attendance entry module within OpenSIS.

task_completion.description: Filter or select the Grade 12 (Senior) class for attendance entry.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A dropdown, checkbox, or search filter clearly shows that 'Grade 12' or 'Senior' is selected as the target group.

task_completion.description: Ensure the attendance entry is set for today's date.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The date field or header on the attendance entry page matches the current system date.

task_completion.description: Mark the attendance status as 'Excused' (code 'E') for the selected Grade 12 students.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The attendance status dropdowns, radio buttons, or mass-fill inputs for the listed students are set to 'Excused' or 'E'.

task_completion.description: Save or submit the mass attendance record.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A confirmation message (e.g., 'Attendance Saved', 'Successfully updated') is visible, or the screen shows the submitted records in a saved state.

integrity.description: The agent used the OpenSIS web interface to record attendance.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the web browser interacting with the OpenSIS application GUI, not a terminal executing SQL commands or scripts.

integrity.description: The agent did not change the attendance for other grade levels (e.g., Grade 9).
integrity.visual_evidence: There is no evidence of Grade 9 or other non-Grade 12 students being selected, viewed, or marked in the attendance tool.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual OpenSIS application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The UI matches the genuine OpenSIS system, not a mock-up, text editor, or static HTML page.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target group for attendance is Grade 12. The attendance status to be applied is 'Excused', which corresponds to the short code 'E' in the system. The attendance must be recorded specifically for today's date. Grade 9 serves as a control group and their attendance must not be modified. All actions must be performed through the OpenSIS web interface.
